topics.title_hint: Weekend Trend Alert: The New Emote Everyone's Copying Right Now
topics.angle: Fresh Saturday trend report on the latest viral Roblox emote/dance that's blowing up on TikTok and inside games — what it's called, where it came from, and how to get it. Different from the 4/15 Catalog Avatar Creator piece: focus on a NEW single trend of the weekend, not the platform.
key_points: What the trend is and when it went viral
Which games/creators started it
How to unlock or perform the emote
Funniest community reactions

topics.title_hint: How to Turn Any Image Into a Roblox Decal ID (Easy 2026 Guide)
topics.angle: Practical step-by-step tutorial on getting a Decal ID from an Image ID — inspired by the fresh RSS headline. Very different from the previous AI-code-writing dev tutorials (4/12, 4/16): this is a hands-on asset workflow guide kids can actually follow to decorate their own games.
key_points: What Decal IDs vs Image IDs actually are
Upload workflow in Creator Dashboard
How to grab the Decal ID once moderation approves
Using the ID in Studio (Decal, Texture, SurfaceGui)
Common moderation pitfalls to avoid
Bonus: batch uploading and organizing your asset library

topics.title_hint: The Camera Angle Trick That Makes Every Obby 10x Easier
topics.angle: One-minute lifehack on using camera tilt + first-person toggle to judge tricky jumps. Different from the 4/16 'tiny jump trick' — that was about input timing, this is about visual/camera control.
key_points: Why default third-person lies to you on narrow jumps
How to tilt/zoom the camera for depth perception
When to switch to first-person mid-obby
Quick practice drill to build the habit

topics.title_hint: Top 5 Underrated Roblox Gems You're Totally Sleeping On in April 2026
topics.angle: Spotlight on smaller/rising experiences with cool gameplay that haven't hit mainstream yet. Deliberately different from 4/17's '2026's Biggest Hits' (which covered the giants) — this list celebrates hidden gems so the audience learns something new.
key_points: Criteria: fewer than X million visits but rising fast
Pick 1: cozy/creative game
Pick 2: unique PvE twist
Pick 3: clever puzzle/co-op
Pick 4: stylish simulator doing something fresh
Pick 5: indie RP gem
How to spot the next hidden gem yourself

topics.title_hint: Dad's Corner: I Finally Played the 99 Nights Update — Help Me
topics.angle: Payoff from yesterday's teaser (4/17) where dad hyped the Saturday update. Today he actually plays it and reviews the new content with classic dad confusion, dad jokes, and genuine excitement. Reviews the update, not the whole game — fresh angle.
key_points: First impressions opening the update
What's actually new (features/items/map)
One thing that scared him more than it should
Dad-joke moment
Honest rating and whether he'll keep playing
